docs.name: Reference Pulse Hero
docs.description: A reference hero block. Conic-gradient halo rotating behind a radial pulse, with motion-driven entry on the headline. Drop your own children in to replace the default composition; the background also ships as a standalone export.

props.name: children
props.description: Slotted hero content. Pass your own headline / CTA / nav. When omitted, a default composition renders.

props.name: backgroundProps
props.type: { conicPalette?: string[]; pulseColor?: string; speed?: number; baseColor?: string; hue?: number; className?: string }
props.description: Forwarded to the background layer. Use `conicPalette` + `pulseColor` for the rotating halo (defaults match preview); `baseColor` is the dark vignette (`#08080a`).

docs.usageCode:
import { ReferencePulseHero } from "@/components/ui/hero-reference-pulse"; export default function Hero() { return ( Hero block

Build with light, not boxes.

A reference hero block. Drop in your own children to override the default composition — the background lives on its own as well.

); }

docs.overview: A minimal hero block that proves the slotted composition pattern. Background lives on its own; the hero accepts children for full content override.
